content:
The user wants me to extract the table from the provided image and convert it into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a technical specification table titled "Specifications and Test Methods". It has columns for "No", "Item", "Specification", and "Test Method". The "Test Method" column contains detailed descriptions and sometimes sub-tables. **2. Structure the table:** - **Header:** "Specifications and Test Methods" - **Columns:** - No - Item - Specification (This column is split into two sub-columns effectively: the parameter and the requirement) - Test Method (This column is split into two sub-columns effectively: the method/parameter and the requirement) **3. Row-by-row extraction:** * **Row 1 (Header):** No, Item, Specification, Test Method(Ref. Standard:JIS C 5101 (all parts), IEC60384 (all parts)) * **Row 2 (10):** * No: 10 * Item: Vibration * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance, Q or D.F. | No defects or abnormalities. Within the specified initial value. Within the specified initial value. * Test Method: Mounting method, Kind of Vibration, Vibration Time, Total amplitude, Vibration directions and time | Solder the capacitor on the test substrate. A simple harmonic motion 10Hz to 55Hz to 10Hz. 1min. 1.5mm. This motion should be applied for a period of 2hours in each 3 mutually perpendicular directions(total of 6hours). * **Row 3 (11):** * No: 11 * Item: Substrate Bending test * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-10% * Test Method: Mounting method, Pressurization Method, Flexure, Holding Time | Reflow solder the capacitor on the test substrate. Shown in Fig.2. 1mm. 5+/-1s * **Row 4 (12):** * No: 12 * Item: Solderability * Specification: 95% of the terminations is to be soldered evenly and continuously. * Test Method: Test Method, Flux, Preheat, Kind of Solder, Test Temperature, Test Time | Solder bath method. Solution of rosin ethanol 25(mass)%. 80°C to 120°C, 10s to 30s. Sn-3.0Ag-0.5Cu(Lead Free Solder). 245+/-5°C. 2+/-0.5s * **Row 5 (13):** * No: 13 * Item: Resistance to Soldering Heat * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change, Q or D.F., I.R., Voltage proof | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-7.5%. Within the specified initial value. Within the specified initial value. No defects or abnormalities. * Test Method: Pre-treatment, Test Method, Kind of Solder, Test Temperature, Test Time, Preheat Temperature, Preheat time, Post-treatment | Heat treatment:Perform a heat treatment at 150+0/-10°C for 1hour and then let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. Solder bath method. Sn-3.0Ag-0.5Cu(Lead Free Solder). 270+/-5°C. 10+/-0.5s. 120°C to 150°C. 1 min. Non treatment:Let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. * **Row 6 (14):** * No: 14 * Item: Temperature Sudden Change * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change, Q or D.F., I.R., Voltage proof | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-7.5%. Within the specified initial value. Within the specified initial value. No defects or abnormalities. * Test Method: Mounting method, Pre-treatment, Cycles, Temperature Cycling, Post-treatment | Solder the capacitor on the test substrate. Heat treatment:Perform a heat treatment at 150+0/-10°C for 1hour and then let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. 5cycles. * *Sub-table inside cell:* * Step | Temp. (°C) | Time(min) * 1 | Min.Operating Temp.+0/-3 | 30+/-3 * 2 | Room Temp. | 2 to 3 * 3 | Max.Operating Temp.+3/-0 | 30+/-3 * 4 | Room Temp. | 2 to 3 * Post-treatment note: Non treatment:Let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. * **Row 7 (15):** * No: 15 * Item: High Temperature High Humidity (Steady) * Specification: Appearance, Capacitance Change, Q or D.F., I.R. | No defects or abnormalities. Within +/-12.5%. DF≦0.05. More than 25Ω · F * Test Method: Mounting method, Test Temperature, Test Humidity, Test Time, Test Voltage, Charge/discharge current, Post-treatment | Solder the capacitor on the test substrate. 40+/-2°C. 90%RH to 95%RH. 500+/-12h. Rated Voltage. 50mA max. Non treatment:Let sit for 24+/-2hours at room temperature, then measure. **4. Final JSON construction:** Combine all extracted data into the requested JSON format.
